mapper.sql: id, url, storage_path, original_name, mime_type, file_size, width, height, md5, created_by, created_at, deleted_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO images (url, storage_path, original_name, mime_type, file_size, width, height, md5, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{url}, #{storagePath}, #{originalName}, #{mimeType}, #{fileSize}, #{width}, #{height}, #{md5}, #{createdBy}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT FROM images WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM images WHERE md5 = #{md5} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM images WHERE url = #{url} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM images WHERE created_by = #{createdBy} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM images WHERE created_by = #{createdBy} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT i.id, i.url, i.storage_path, i.original_name, i.mime_type, i.file_size, i.width, i.height, i.md5, i.created_by, i.created_at, i.deleted_at FROM images i LEFT JOIN image_usages iu ON i.id = iu.image_id WHERE i.created_by = #{createdBy} AND i.deleted_at IS NULL AND iu.id IS NULL ORDER BY i.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM images i LEFT JOIN image_usages iu ON i.id = iu.image_id WHERE i.created_by = #{createdBy} AND i.deleted_at IS NULL AND iu.id IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE images SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select:
SELECT i.*, COUNT(iu.id) AS usageCount FROM images i LEFT JOIN image_usages iu ON iu.image_id = i.id WHERE i.deleted_at IS NULL
AND i.original_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND iu.id IS NOT NULL
AND iu.id IS NULL
GROUP BY i.id ORDER BY
i.created_at ASC i.file_size DESC i.file_size ASC usageCount DESC usageCount ASC i.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT i.id) FROM images i LEFT JOIN image_usages iu ON iu.image_id = i.id WHERE i.deleted_at IS NULL
AND i.original_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND iu.id IS NOT NULL
AND iu.id IS NULL

SELECT iu.ref_type AS refType, iu.ref_id AS refId, iu.field, COALESCE(p.title, '') AS refTitle FROM image_usages iu LEFT JOIN posts p ON iu.ref_type = 'post' AND p.id = iu.ref_id AND p.is_delelte = 0 WHERE iu.image_id = #{imageId}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalImages, COALESCE(SUM(file_size), 0) AS totalSize, SUM(CASE WHEN u.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS referencedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN u.id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unreferencedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN u.id IS NULL AND i.created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS oldUnreferencedCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.id IS NULL AND i.created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN i.file_size ELSE 0 END), 0) AS oldUnreferencedSize FROM images i LEFT JOIN image_usages u ON u.image_id = i.id WHERE i.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT i.* FROM images i LEFT JOIN image_usages u ON u.image_id = i.id WHERE i.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.id IS NULL AND i.created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{beforeDays} DAY) ORDER BY i.created_at ASC
